MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Screen for Child Anxiety Related Disorders (SCARED), 41-item
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 41-item anxiety screen; each item rated 0 (Not True/Hardly Ever True), 1 (Somewhat True/Sometimes True), 2 (Very True/Often True) over the last three months.

scared_1.Description: When I feel frightened, it is hard to breathe.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_2.Description: I get headaches when I am at school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_3.Description: I don't like to be with people I don't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_4.Description: I get scared if I sleep away from home.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_5.Description: I worry about other people liking me.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_6.Description: When I get frightened, I feel like passing out.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_8.Description: I follow my mother or father wherever they go.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_9.Description: People tell me that I look nervous.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_10.Description: I feel nervous with people I don't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_12.Description: When I get frightened, I feel like I am going crazy.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_14.Description: I worry about being as good as other kids.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_15.Description: When I get frightened, I feel like things are not real.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_16.Description: I have nightmares about something bad happening to my parents.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_17.Description: I worry about going to school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_18.Description: When I get frightened, my heart beats fast.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_20.Description: I have nightmares about something bad happening to me.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_21.Description: I worry about things working out for me.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_22.Description: When I get frightened, I sweat a lot.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_24.Description: I get really frightened for no reason at all.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_25.Description: I am afraid to be alone in the house.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_26.Description: It is hard for me to talk with people I don't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_27.Description: When I get frightened, I feel like I am choking.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_28.Description: People tell me that I worry too much.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_29.Description: I don't like to be away from my family.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_30.Description: I am afraid of having anxiety (or panic) attacks.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_31.Description: I worry that something bad might happen to my parents.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_32.Description: I feel shy with people I don't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_33.Description: I worry about what is going to happen in the future.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_34.Description: When I get frightened, I feel like throwing up.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_35.Description: I worry about how well I do things.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_36.Description: I am scared to go to school.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_37.Description: I worry about things that have already happened.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_38.Description: When I get frightened, I feel dizzy.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_39.Description: I feel nervous when I am with other children or adults and I have to do something while they watch me (for example: read aloud, speak, play a game, play a sport).

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_40.Description: I feel nervous when I am going to parties, dances, or any place where there will be people that I don't know well.

Levels.0: Not True or Hardly Ever True
Not True or Hardly Ever True

scared_score_total.Description: SCARED total: sum of all 41 items scared_1-scared_41. Range 0-82. n/a if any item missing.

scared_score_anxietyDisorder.Description: Screen-positive flag: 1 if scared_score_total >= 25 (suggestive of an anxiety disorder), else 0. n/a if total is n/a.
